title: High-Purity Alumina Ceramic Components from Ma'aden
entry_mechanism: Ma'aden HPA programme combined with semiconductor ceramic component manufacturing JV
executive_summary:
High-purity alumina (HPA, 99.99%+ Al₂O₃) is a critical material for semiconductor manufacturing — used as the substrate for LED chips, as a polishing abrasive (CMP slurry) in wafer planarization, as ceramic ring components in plasma etch chambers, and as the dielectric layer in advanced memory chips. Ma'aden's alumina refinery at Ras Al-Khair produces smelter-grade alumina (99.5%); upgrading to HPA grades creates direct value-add in the semiconductor supply chain.

Node SC-3 targets Saudi Ma'aden HPA production and downstream semiconductor ceramic components: pure alumina polishing powder for CMP slurry, alumina ceramic chamber components for semiconductor equipment, and alumina substrate wafers for LED production. The AM-2 technical ceramics programme provides the manufacturing foundation; SC-3 adds the semiconductor-grade purity requirements.

The global HPA market was valued at $2.8 billion in 2024 growing at 28.4% CAGR — driven by LED, EV battery separator, and semiconductor demand. Saudi Arabia's Ma'aden cost-advantaged alumina supply chain creates a natural entry point into this high-growth market.

companies.name: Sumitomo Chemical (HPA)
companies.rationale: Sumitomo produces HPA for semiconductor and LED applications. Technology licensing for Ma'aden HPA upgrade.

companies.name: Altech Chemicals
companies.rationale: Altech has HPA production technology using kaolin feedstock applicable to alumina upgrade.

companies.name: CeramTec (Semiconductor Ceramics)
companies.rationale: CeramTec produces alumina ceramic components for semiconductor manufacturing equipment. Manufacturing JV for Saudi semiconductor ceramics.

companies.name: Kyocera (Semiconductor Ceramics)
companies.rationale: Kyocera is the world's largest semiconductor ceramic components manufacturer.

companies.name: Applied Materials (AMAT)
companies.rationale: AMAT uses alumina ceramics in its semiconductor etch equipment. Qualifying Ma'aden HPA ceramics as AMAT-approved components.

partners.name: Ma'aden Aluminium
partners.upgrade: Ma'aden HPA refining investment; Sumitomo or Altech technology JV; 4N and 5N purity alumina production; Ma'aden ceramics downstream processing

partners.name: KACST Advanced Materials (AM-2 connection)
partners.upgrade: Extend AM-2 technical ceramics to semiconductor grade; HPA characterisation and qualification; Saudi semiconductor ceramics quality laboratory

partners.name: SSIH (SC-1 connection)
partners.upgrade: SSIH Phase II fabrication using Saudi HPA ceramics; closed-loop Saudi semiconductor supply chain; Ma'aden HPA → SSIH chamber components

partners.name: KFUPM Materials Engineering
partners.current: Ceramics and materials engineering; purity characterisation
partners.upgrade: HPA and semiconductor ceramics engineering programme; Ma'aden-KFUPM HPA research partnership; Saudi semiconductor materials characterisation laboratory
